name: A curated list of awesome Nginx distributions, 3rd party modules, Active developers, etc. :octocat:
description: A curated list of awesome Nginx distributions, 3rd party modules, Active developers, etc. :octocat:

links.title: nginx-rtmp-module
links.description: NGINX-based Media Streaming Server.

links.title: nginx-http-flv-module
links.description: A media streaming server based on nginx-rtmp-module, provides HTTP-FLV.

links.title: xss-nginx-module
links.description: Native support for cross-site scripting (XSS) in an nginx.

links.title: srcache-nginx-module
links.description: Transparent subrequest-based caching layout for arbitrary nginx locations.

links.title: replace-filter-nginx-module
links.description: Streaming regular expression replacement in response bodies.

links.title: rds-json-nginx-module
links.description: An nginx output filter that formats Resty DBD Streams generated by ngx_drizzle and others to JSON.

links.title: echo-nginx-module
links.description: An Nginx module for bringing the power of "echo", "sleep", "time" and more to Nginx's config file.

links.title: headers-more-nginx-module
links.description: Set, add, and clear arbitrary output headers.

links.title: rds-csv-nginx-module
links.description: Nginx output filter module to convert Resty-DBD-Streams (RDS) to Comma-Separated Values (CSV).

links.title: memc-nginx-module
links.description: An extended version of the standard memcached module that supports set, add, delete, and many more memcached commands..

links.title: encrypted-session-nginx-module
links.description: encrypt and decrypt nginx variable values.

links.title: redis2-nginx-module
links.description: Nginx upstream module for the Redis 2.0 protocol.

links.title: drizzle-nginx-module
links.description: an nginx upstream module that talks to mysql and drizzle by libdrizzle.

links.title: array-var-nginx-module
links.description: Add support for array-typed variables to nginx config files.

links.title: set-misc-nginx-module
links.description: Various set_xxx directives added to nginx's rewrite module (md5/sha1, sql/json quoting, and many more).

links.title: nginx-error-abuse-module
links.description: Ratelimits and bans clients making excessive error (404/403/5xx) requests; shared-memory counters, optional Redis for multi-server, returns 429 to banned clients.

links.title: nginx-eval-module
links.description: A module for evaluating memcached or proxy response into variable.

links.title: ngx_pagespeed
links.description: Automatic PageSpeed optimization module for Nginx.

links.title: ngx_devel_kit
links.description: Nginx Development Kit - an Nginx module that adds additional generic tools that module developers can use in their own modules.

links.title: ngx_cache_purge
links.description: nginx module which adds ability to purge content from FastCGI, proxy, SCGI and uWSGI caches.

links.title: ngx_postgres
links.description: upstream module that allows nginx to communicate directly with PostgreSQL database.

links.title: nginx-backtrace
links.description: A Nginx module to dump backtrace when a worker process exits abnormally.

links.title: nginx-http-concat
links.description: A Nginx module for concatenating files in a given context: CSS and JS files usually.

links.title: nginx-http-user-agent
links.description: A nginx module to match browsers and crawlers.

links.title: nginx-http-footer-filter
links.description: A nginx module that prints some text in the footer of a request.

links.title: nginx-http-slice
links.description: Nginx module for serving a file in slices (reverse byte-range).

links.title: nginx-audio-track-for-hls-module
links.description: Nginx module that generates audio track for HTTP Live Streaming (HLS) streams on the fly.

links.title: nginx-access-plus
links.description: nginx module allows limiting access to certain http request methods and client addresses.

links.title: ngx_http_subrange_module
links.description: Split one big HTTP/Range request to multiple subrange requesets.

links.title: nginx_tcp_proxy_module
links.description: add the feature of tcp proxy with nginx, with health check and status monitor.

links.title: nginx_ajp_module
links.description: support AJP protocol proxy with Nginx.

links.title: ngx_http_substitutions_filter_module
links.description: a filter module which can do both regular expression and fixed string substitutions for nginx.

links.title: nginx-sticky-module
links.description: A nginx module to add an upstream server persistance using cookies.

links.title: nginx-http-sysguard
links.description: A Nginx module to protect servers when system load or memory use goes too high.

links.title: nginx-tfs
links.description: An Asynchronous Nginx module providing a RESTful API for TFS (Taobao File System).

links.title: ngx_aws_auth
links.description: nginx module to proxy to authenticated AWS services.

links.title: nginx_mod_akamai_g2o
links.description: Nginx Module for Authenticating Akamai G2O requests.

links.title: ngx_supervisord
links.description: nginx module providing API to communicate with supervisord and manage (start/stop) backends on-demand.

links.title: ngx_http_google_filter_module

links.title: ngx_http_dyups_module

links.title: ngx_sync_msg_module
links.description: This module provides a mechanism to sync messages between workers for your module.

links.description: A module for nginx web server for handling file uploads using multipart/form-data encoding (RFC 1867).

links.title: nginx-fluentd-module
links.description: Nginx module for Fluentd data collector.

links.title: ngx_zeromq
links.description: ZeroMQ transport for nginx.

links.description: nginx module which adds ability to view cache node info from FastCGI, proxy, SCGI and uWSGI caches.

links.title: nginx_http_push_module
links.description: Turn NGiNX into an adept HTTP push server.

links.title: nginx-selective-cache-purge-module
links.description: A module to purge cache by GLOB patterns..

links.title: naxsi
links.description: NAXSI is an open-source, high performance, low rules maintenance WAF for NGINX.

links.title: protobuf-nginx
links.description: Google Protocol Buffers code generator for nginx module developers.

links.title: testcookie-nginx-module
links.description: simple robot mitigation module using cookie based challenge/response technique.

links.title: nginx_circle_gif
links.description: this module generates simple circle images with the colors and size specified in the URL.

links.title: nginx-binaries
links.description: Nginx and njs binaries for Linux (x86_64, aarch64, ppc64le), macOS and Windows; Linux binaries are static so works on every Linux.

links.title: NPMplus
links.description: Docker container for managing Nginx proxy hosts with a simple, powerful interface

links.title: nginx-modules
links.description: APT repository providing pre-built NGINX dynamic modules for Debian and Ubuntu (amd64/arm64), installable via `apt` without compiling from source.

links.title: GetPageSpeed Extras for Debian/Ubuntu
links.description: Free APT repository with 100+ pre-built NGINX dynamic modules for Debian (Bookworm/Trixie) and Ubuntu (Bionic/Focal/Jammy/Noble) on amd64 and arm64. No signup or auth required. Covers ModSecurity, brotli, geoip2, headers-more, JWT, TOTP, naxsi, NJS, and a long tail of modules not packaged elsewhere. Cross-distro counterpart for RHEL/SLES/Amazon Linux at extras.getpagespeed.com.

links.title: seo-sidecar
links.description: FastAPI + nginx SSI sidecar that injects fresh Schema.org JSON-LD into nginx-served sites without redeploys or cron jobs. Production-ready, MIT licensed.

links.title: nginx-scanner-trap
links.description: One-script honeypot for existing nginx servers: bots probing paths like /.env or /.git get banned on all ports via fail2ban + nftables. Interactive install with whitelisting, dry-run preview, Debian/Ubuntu, MIT licensed.

links.title: Laradock
links.description: Full PHP development environment based on Docker, includes Nginx as one of its swappable services.

links.title: Nginx admin guide
links.description: Nginx and nginx plus admin guide.

links.title: Nginx documentation
links.description: Nginx documentation introduction.

links.title: Nginx blog
links.description: News, views, and how-tos from nginx.

links.title: Nginx beginner’s Guide
links.description: This guide gives a basic introduction to nginx and describes some simple tasks that can be done with it.

links.title: Nginx tutorials
links.description: Nginx tutorials by [Agentzh](https://github.com/agentzh).

links.title: Nginx docs cn
links.description: The chinese translation of nginx documentation.

links.title: Nginx book
links.description: Nginx from primer to expert (In Chinese).

links.title: Nginx module development
links.description: Emiller's guide to nginx module development.

links.title: OpenResty best practice
links.description: OpenResty best practice(In Chinese).

links.title: Nginx-cheatsheet
links.description: A quick reference to common server configurations from serving static files to using in congruency with Node.js applications.

links.title: Monitoring Nginx on Kubernetes
links.description: Deployment options, use cases, metrics and alerts for containerized Nginx instances on Kubernetes.
